scenario.description: Synthetic High dependency advisory discovered during a release candidate gate.

events.note: Backup assumes synthetic incident ownership because the primary is unavailable.
The scenario is treated as release-blocking even though a triage record could document it.

events.reason: High vulnerabilities cannot be temporarily allowed for publication.

events.next_action: Fix or remove the affected dependency, rerun the locked gate, and obtain primary review before release.

non_claims: This synthetic exercise does not prove security mailbox delivery.
This synthetic exercise does not prove GitHub organization or crates.io permissions.
This synthetic exercise does not prove real incident availability or remediation performance.
